title: limacia triandra
intro: Limacia triandra, also known as the bitter thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Limacia triandra can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and other ailments.
